{"cards": [{"name": "Synaptic Overload", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "As an additional cost to cast ~, overclock. (Exile the top three cards of your library. You may play them until end of turn.)
Counter target spell. If you overclocked this turn, draw a card.", "flavor_text": ""The prototype neural interface worked perfectly. The subject's brain, however, did not." —Dr. Malleus, Cult of Science", "power": null, "toughness": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "keywords": ["Overclock"], "design_notes": "Uncommon blue instant using overclock as additional cost with conditional bonus. The base effect (counter spell) is fair for 1U, but the overclock cost gives you card selection plus a bonus card draw if you've already overclocked. Risk/reward of exiling cards balanced against powerful effects."}, {"name": "Jury-Rigged Berserker", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Soldier", "oracle_text": "Haste
Whenever ~ attacks, if you overclocked this turn, ~ gets +3/+0 and gains trample until end of turn.", "flavor_text": ""Sir, the combat stimulants are showing a 73% chance of catastrophic organ failure." "Excellent. Deploy immediately."", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "rarity": "uncommon", "keywords": ["Haste", "Overclock"], "design_notes": "Uncommon red creature with conditional overclock bonus. Vanilla 2/2 haste for 3 is below rate, but becomes a 5/2 trampler if you overclock. Encourages building around overclock effects and rewards aggressive strategies."}, {"name": "Vivisector Prime", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}{B}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Scientist", "oracle_text": "Deathtouch
Whenever you overclock (exile the top three cards of your library, you may play them until end of turn), each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
{3}{B}: Overclock.", "flavor_text": ""The human circulatory system has such fascinating failure modes when subjected to protonium exposure."", "power": "3", "toughness": "3", "rarity": "rare", "keywords": ["Deathtouch", "Overclock"], "design_notes": "Rare black creature with 'whenever you overclock' trigger and repeatable overclock. Creates a life-swing engine that rewards overclocking multiple times. The activated ability is expensive enough to be fair but cheap enough to be repeatable."}, {"name": "Cascade Protocol", "mana_cost": "{3}{R}{R}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Overclock, then overclock again. (Exile the top three cards of your library. You may play them until end of turn.)
~ deals 2 damage to any target for each card exiled with ~ this way.", "flavor_text": ""The cascade effect exceeded all theoretical parameters. Fortunately, so did the explosion." —Final log, Research Station Gamma", "power": null, "toughness": null, "rarity": "rare", "keywords": ["Overclock"], "design_notes": "Rare red sorcery that overclocks twice, guaranteeing 6 exiled cards and 12 damage. High mana cost balances the powerful effect. Gives you card selection while dealing significant damage, fitting red's aggressive nature."}, {"name": "Archscientist Vex, the Unbound", "mana_cost": "{2}{U}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["U", "R"], "color_identity": ["U", "R"], "type_line": "Legendary Creature — Human Scientist", "oracle_text": "Flying
Cards exiled with overclock (exile the top three cards of your library, you may play them until end of turn) cost {2} less to cast.
Whenever you cast a spell exiled with overclock, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy.", "flavor_text": ""I have transcended the limitations of sanity, safety, and the laws of thermodynamics."", "power": "3", "toughness": "4", "rarity": "mythic", "keywords": ["Flying", "Overclock"], "design_notes": "Mythic legendary showcasing overclock as a build-around. Cost reduction makes overclocked cards more playable, while copying them provides explosive value. The copy effect works on any spell cast from overclock, creating powerful synergies. Splashy enough for mythic while being a clear overclock payoff."}]}
